verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Broken, mocked and scorned Was a man hanging from a Cross With a crown of thorns Who is He, this man who died for me This given Son who was born to die So we could be redeemed

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: He died for you, He died for me He took my place And He bore my shame That day on Calvary The bleeding One, the Holy Son What kind of man is this who'd walk this road alone… Jesus

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: It was supposed to be me Hanging from that tree It was my sin that crucified Him I don't deserve any mercy But as we come to You today We remember what You gave Lord, through this bleeding Word we have You revealed to us our names

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Oh, I didn't see but I believe Yes, I believe!
